scripts.build:games: npm run build:tictactoe && npm run build:gamba && npm run build:scattergories && npm run build:meltdown-clowns
scripts.build:tictactoe: npm install --prefix games/tictactoe && npm run build --prefix games/tictactoe
scripts.build:gamba: npm install --prefix games/gamba && npm run build --prefix games/gamba
scripts.build:scattergories: npm install --prefix games/scattergories && npm run build --prefix games/scattergories
scripts.build:meltdown-clowns: npm install --prefix games/meltdown-clowns && npm run build --prefix games/meltdown-clowns
